capabilities_used.evidence: 反复把 ETF 资金流当成主驱动。例：2025-05-09 “selling pressure is easing, and massive inflows are coming through ETFs”；2025-01-31 “the buying engine for paper Bitcoins is still running”；2024-10-25 “U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF demand hit a 6-month high”。
长期持币者行为是他的核心框架之一。例：2024-05-21 “holders are increasingly inclined to hold rather than sell”；2025-12-30 “Bitcoin long-term holders stopped selling.”
经常用卖压/入所/托管钱包流向判断方向。例：2025-04-16 “#Bitcoin supply > demand”；2025-03-13 “Ethereum has faced record active selling over the past 3 months”；2024-06-26 用 US gov't 卖出 4K BTC 对 Coinbase Prime 流动性做影响评估。
虽不总是显式点名“稳定币供应”，但经常把稳定币和外部购买力视为流动性燃料。例：2025-05-11 讨论 stablecoins 的未来；2024-12-27 韩元走弱时“Koreans are converting KRW to $BTC and $USDT”。
明确使用 MVRV/链上周期阈值。例：2024-02-29 “MVRV hit 2.5...” 并类比 2020 牛市前状态；多条推文提及“on-chain cyclical indicators”处于 bull-bear boundary。
经常以减半后阶段推断中周期位置。例：2024-08-21 “In the last Bitcoin halving cycle, the bull rally began in Q4.”
长期大量使用四年/历史类比框架，虽然 2025-07-24 又公开修正。例：2024-03-28 把 2023-24 路径直接映射 2020-21；2025-07-24 “#Bitcoin cycle theory is dead.” 说明他此前确实高度依赖该框架。
对衍生品拥挤和压力累积有明确观察。例：2024-08-08 “futures trading volume hit an ATH”；2025-01-29 “taker sell pressure is increasing. Be cautious if you're leveraged.”
经常用杠杆拥挤/长爆风险表达风险。例：2025-04-09 “#Bitcoin long squeeze: cascading liquidations are deleveraging the market.”
不是他最常用，但有明显的 squeeze/反身性思路。例：2025-09-27 “perp whales went long heavily on OKX, Bybit, HTX”；他常把市场过度单边仓位理解为下一阶段推动力。
经常比较价格和杠杆情绪的错位。例：2025-03-14 “#Bitcoin demand seems stuck”；2025-03-04 “Fundamentals remain strong, with more mining rigs coming online” 但价格和情绪没有同步。
对 BTC.D 与山寨季切换有系统性观察。例：2024-07-31 “Whales are preparing for the next altcoin rally”；2024-11-27 “Why is altcoin season delayed?”；2024-11-28 直接讨论 dominance 不易下跌。
虽然不总是直接说 M2，但宏观流动性是重要上层框架。例：2025-11-28 “further upside likely depends on macro liquidity”；2025-03-17 “fresh liquidity drying up”。
他持续比较 BTC 与黄金的避险定价。例：2025-04-09 “Bad news: BTC isn’t digital gold yet. Good news: It’ll eventually get there.”；2026-01-26 “If the market still prices Bitcoin as risk-on, it's undervalued”。
他常用网络价值/实现市值/链上活跃度与市值关系做估值。例：2024-05-17 “market cap is growing faster than its realized cap”；2024-05-31 “low price volatility, on-chain activity remains high”。
推文经常先做 regime 判断，再谈牛熊。例：2024-09-30 “#Bitcoin is still in the middle of the bull cycle”；2024-08-09 “shifted back to signaling a bull market”。
会明确切换到熊/横盘 regime，而不是永远看多。例：2025-03-17 “bull cycle is over, expecting 6–12 months of bearish or sideways price action”；2025-03-18 “it now looks pretty clear that we're entering a bear market.”
很重视高波动下的去杠杆与风险。例：2024-08-08 指出现货/期货成交量极端放大；2025-07-30 “Using over 5x leverage means you're exponentially more likely to get liquidated within 24 hours.”
虽然偏长期看多，但在下跌阶段会明确反对无脑抄底。例：2025-03-17 先判定 6–12 个月 bearish/sideways；2025-04-07 “Got so much hate for being bearish.”
他不太给精确仓位公式，但有明显的杠杆约束倾向。例：2025-01-29 “Be cautious if you're leveraged.”；2025-07-30 明确抨击 5x 以上杠杆。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Realized Cap vs Market Cap Regime
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 实现市值与总市值增速的周期判断
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Compare market cap growth with realized cap growth to infer whether price appreciation is supported by fresh capital absorption or speculative markup. Persistent market-cap outperformance indicates mid-to-late bull markup; realized-cap catch-up indicates healthier accumulation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 比较总市值与实现市值的增速，判断上涨是由新资本吸收支撑，还是由投机性估值抬升驱动。总市值持续快于实现市值，偏向牛市中后段估值扩张；实现市值跟上，则偏向更健康的吸筹。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-05-17: “Its market cap is growing faster than its realized cap, a trend that typically lasts around two years.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sell-side Liquidity Absorption
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Estimate whether known selling sources such as governments, miners, Mt.Gox distributions, or old whales can be absorbed by current exchange, OTC, and ETF demand without regime damage.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 评估政府、矿工、Mt.Gox、老鲸鱼等已知卖方来源，是否会被当前交易所、OTC、ETF 需求吸收而不破坏市场趋势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-26: “US gov't sold 4K Bitcoin today, but less likely to impact the market. Coinbase Prime handled 20-49K BTC in sell-side liquidity daily...”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Paper Bitcoin Buying Engine
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track synthetic or custodial demand channels such as ETFs, trusts, treasury companies, and prime brokerage products as persistent price support separate from visible retail spot flows.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪 ETF、信托、比特币金库公司、主经纪产品等“纸比特币”需求通道，把它们视为独立于链上散户现货流之外的持续买盘来源。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-01-31: “The buying engine for paper Bitcoins is still running.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Old Whales to New Whales Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use age bands, realized profits, dormancy, and custody clustering to detect whether old holders are distributing to institutions/new whales rather than retail, which changes top formation dynamics.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用币龄、已实现利润、休眠度和托管聚类判断老持有人是否在向机构/新鲸鱼而非散户换手，这会改变顶部形成方式。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-03-28: “Old whales are selling Bitcoin to new whales(TradFi), not retail investors.”；2024-04-24 提到 Average Dormancy 13 年峰值。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Altcoin Limit-Wall Accumulation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Monitor cumulative limit buy quote volume in altcoins to infer stealth accumulation by larger players before broad altcoin rallies.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 监控山寨币累计限价买单报价量，以识别大资金在全面山寨行情前的隐蔽吸筹。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 7 明确标注“LIMIT BUY”；2024-07-31 推文：“Limit buy order volume for altcoins... is increasing, indicating that strong buy walls are being set up.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Composite On-chain Cycle Boundary
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 链上综合牛熊边界信号
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Blend PnL index, 365-day moving average oscillator, realized cap growth, demand/supply, and capital inflow measures into a single cycle state machine: bull, boundary, bear, recovery.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 PnL 指数、365 日均线振荡器、实现市值增速、供需关系、资本流入等合成为一个周期状态机：牛市、边界、熊市、复苏。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 2 和图片 3 都是明确的周期 composite 图；2025-02-27 与 2025-03-17 多次使用“bull-bear boundary”“every on-chain metric signals a bear market”。

personal_quirks.quote: Two months ago, I said the bull cycle was over, but I was wrong.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 愿意公开认错并快速修正框架，优先服从新数据而不是维护面子。

personal_quirks.quote: If you're panic selling now, you're probably a noob.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把恐慌卖出视为非专业行为；在大级别牛市回撤中更倾向反身性看多。
旧的四年周期/鲸鱼卖给散户叙事失效时，必须重建模型，不能迷信历史模板。

personal_quirks.quote: The bus only departs when you get off.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 市场常以最大化折磨参与者的方式运行；情绪化下车往往发生在接近反转处。

personal_quirks.quote: On-chain indicators are not always bullish.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他不是宗教式多头；链上数据在不同阶段可以给出明确看空结论。

unique_traits: 他和纯 TA 交易员最大的不同，是把 BTC 看成一个可被链上数据、ETF 流、托管钱包、矿工/鲸鱼行为实时审计的资本网络，而不是单纯 K 线博弈。他会用周期和宏观流动性做上层框架，但真正的入场/观点切换依据更像“供需仪表盘”而非传统形态学。即使附图里出现 MA、PnL 周期信号、市场结构图，他的核心仍是链上供给、需求、持有者结构与机构资金流。

high_conviction_phrases: every on-chain metric signals a bear market
still in the middle of the bull cycle
massive inflows are coming through ETFs
low_conviction_phrases: less likely to impact the market
not sure why, but I’m feeling it too
